_comment: Tier-2 for skfem mixed_poisson#: a bidirectional element-class inventory gate. 19 catalog-claimed real names must be present (covers triangle/quad/hex/tet/line P0/P1/P2/Argyris/Morley/Mini/DG/RT0/RT1/BFS/Hermite/Vector). 1 catalog-flagged phantom name (ElementTriRaviartThomas) must remain absent. 13 under-exposed real classes (BDM1, CR, CCR, Hex2, TetCR, TetCCR, TetRT1, Wedge1, Line*, Global, Composite) must be present — encoding future-coverage opportunities and detecting upstream renames. Layer A scanner derived. Verified empirically against skfem 12.0.1 on 2026-06-01.
